bodies.reasoning: analytic surfaces (bspline, cone, cylinder, plane, sphere, torus) with no single dominant axis (largest coaxial cluster covers only 1%) and no prismatic direction -> CSG assembly of primitives with chamfers (cones) / fillets (tori).
42% of surface area is free-form (bspline/bezier/…) — loft or polyhedron fallback for those regions.
